nodes.context: Caste-based dacoit band active in Kaimur plateau, Bihar, led by Ramashish Koeri.
Caste-based gang led by Ghamari Karwar, active in Kaimur region.
Caste-based gang led by Rambachan Yadav, active in Kaimur region.
Caste-based gang led by Triveni Kahar, active in Kaimur region.
Caste-based gang led by Gaurik, active in Kaimur region.
Caste-based gangs of the Yadav community in Rohtas district.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang, along with four other caste-based gangs led by Ghamari Karwar, Rambachan Yadav, Triveni Kahar, and Gaurik was responsible for over hundred murders in the Kaimur region.
edges.context: The Ramashish Koeri gang cooperated with these four gangs in committing murders.

edges.evidence_quote: This incident broke the lull in the gang wars between the Yadav and Koeri led gangs in Rohtas district.
edges.context: The Ramashish Koeri gang was in conflict with Yadav caste gangs.
